==Chinese==

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|艸|叔|alt1=艹|c1=s|c2=p|t1=grass|ls=psc}}.

===Etymology===
From {{inh|zh|sit-pro|*sV-n̥uk||bean, eye}} (STEDT under PTB ''*s-nuk''; {{zh-ref|Schuessler, 2007}} under PST ''*snuk''). Cognate with {{cog|tbq-lob-pro|*(s-)nok||bean}} (whence {{cog|my|ပဲနောက်||t=bean}}, {{cog|lhu|nɔ̂ʔ}}, etc.), {{cog|kac|nòʔ}}.
